title: The Silent Deterioration
description: Heart failure patient gradual weight gain over 2 weeks. Trend suggests fluid retention.

triggering_alert.alert_message: Gradual weight gain 6.4 kg over 14 days.

key_anamnesis_facts: Shortness of breath walking to bathroom

gold_standard_brief.primary_concern: High suspicion acute decompensated heart failure with fluid retention.
